推荐场景: 餐厅餐桌｜综合菜单、偏好、忌口、推荐
60秒任务: 「餐厅 Boss」：菜单/偏好/限制确认；A=重复确认后完成；B=猜测/乱确认翻车。
目标功能: 点餐｜偏好｜限制｜推荐｜账单｜礼貌请求
场景族: 咖啡店｜餐厅｜外卖柜台｜朋友聚餐｜食堂
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Can we see the menu first?（看菜单）
I’d like ___, but without ___.（点单+限制）
What do you recommend for lunch?（推荐）
Does this dish have nuts in it?（成分确认）
Please make it less spicy.（口味调整）
Can we order now?（开始点餐）
We need one more minute.（需要时间）
Could you bring two waters?（请求服务）
This is not my order.（订单问题）
Can you check the bill?（核对账单）
Can I pay separately?（分开付款）
The food was good, thank you.（反馈）
I can’t eat dairy, so I’ll choose another dish.（原因+决定）
For here or to go?（堂食/外带）
That’s all for now.（结束）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: menu, lunch, dish, order, bill, water, nuts, dairy, rice, noodles, card
Verbs: see, order, recommend, bring, check, pay, choose, eat
Adjectives: spicy, good, wrong, separate, vegetarian, light
Time / Place: now, first, for here, to go, at the table
Chunks: less spicy, without ___, check the bill, pay separately, wrong order
